name: @codex-phone-hub/codex-web
description: Self-hosted mobile web console for controlling local Codex from a phone.

scripts.test: tsx --test test/auth_store.test.ts test/active_turn_store.test.ts test/admin_render_stability.test.ts test/artifact_store.test.ts test/cli.test.ts test/config.test.ts test/diagnostics.test.ts test/event_bus.test.ts test/workspace_event_bus.test.ts test/events.test.ts test/hybrid_auth_store.test.ts test/identity_store.test.ts test/install_docs.test.ts test/launchd_scripts.test.ts test/remote_commands.test.ts test/report_store.test.ts test/runtime_resolution.test.ts test/runtime.test.ts test/server_auth.test.ts test/server_multi_user.test.ts test/session_settings_store.test.ts test/terminal_manager.test.ts
